cmake_minimum_required(VERSION 3.13)
set(CMAKE_VERBOSE_MAKEFILE on)

add_compile_options(
        -fexceptions
        -frtti

        -std=c++17
        -Wall
        -Wpedantic
        -Wno-gnu-zero-variadic-macro-arguments
=======
        -std=c++20
        -Wall
        -Wpedantic
>>>>>>> 72d902e140947319760ec03ff2e0f12b3a328440
        -DLOG_TAG=\"ReactNative\")


file(GLOB react_nativemodule_core_SRC CONFIGURE_DEPENDS
        ReactCommon/*.cpp
        platform/android/ReactCommon/*.cpp)
add_library(react_nativemodule_core
<<<<<<< HEAD
        SHARED
=======
        OBJECT
>>>>>>> 72d902e140947319760ec03ff2e0f12b3a328440

        PUBLIC
          ${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}
          ${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}/platform/android/
        )

target_link_libraries(react_nativemodule_core
        fbjni
        folly_runtime
